response: The context states that Governor Duquesne sent additional French forces under Claude-Pierre Pecaudy de Contrecœur to relieve Saint-Pierre. Contrecœur led 500 men. Therefore, the number of men that Duquesne sent to relieve Saint-Pierre was 500.
expected: Contrecœur led 500 men south from Fort Venango on April 5, 1754
